signals.headline: Trump Escalates Greenland Push with Tariff Threats on 8 European Nations** | YES | HIGH[1]
signals.raw:
Trump Escalates Greenland Push with Tariff Threats on 8 European Nations** | YES | HIGH[1]  
President Trump announced on Saturday that if no deal is reached for U.S. acquisition of Greenland, he will impose new tariffs on Denmark, Norway, Sweden, France, Germany, the UK, the Netherlands, and Finland; this fast-moving escalation ties to Arctic strategy, NATO tensions, and markets reacting to gold/

signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Annual Inflation Confirmed at 2.2% (Up from 2.0%, Below 2.4% Forecast)** | YES | HIGH confidence[1][3]

signals.headline: No New Confirmed Developments on Peru General Election** | NO | HIGH[4]
signals.raw:
No New Confirmed Developments on Peru General Election** | NO | HIGH[4]  
Peru's presidential election occurred April 12 with a likely runoff on June 7 among 35 candidates; no just-confirmed results, winners, or resolutions reported, though candidates have mining ties and note Trump's Latin America focus[4].
matched_markets: Peru General Election invalidated by June 30?

signals.headline: Trump Gold Card Program Remains as September 2025 Executive Order** | NO | HIGH[2][3]
signals.raw:
Trump Gold Card Program Remains as September 2025 Executive Order** | NO | HIGH[2][3]  
The Gold Card visa—$5 million "gift" for expedited green card path to U.S. residency—was ordered September 19, 2025, with implementation due within 90 days; no new confirmations, announcements, or market-moving updates today[2][3].
